scope.purpose: 在稳定行身份和记录版本下维护单元格草稿，阻止无效提交，并把一次可审计提交意图交给消费方。
in: 首次编辑时冻结的行基线版本
文本输入适配与类型解析
草稿计数、全部提交与全部放弃
提交失败和版本冲突保留草稿
匹配提交成功后清理已提交草稿
行或可编辑列退出作用域时的草稿对账
DataGrid 键盘、焦点、列布局与本地查询复用
out: 服务端权限、事务、幂等和版本写入实现

api.columns: branded EditableGrid columns with read, format, parse and optional validate
api.identity: getRowId(row) provides stable business-row identity; getRecordVersion(row) provides a non-empty opaque concurrency token.
api.columnConstruction: Columns are created with defineEditableGridColumn; a column without edit is read-only and column id is the persisted change-field key.
api.versionSemantics: The first draft for a row freezes its expectedVersion for every draft in that row; version advancement means a different opaque token, not lexical or numeric ordering.
api.editing: drafts are component-owned and keyed by rowId plus columnId
api.commit: onCommitRequested receives commitId and row changes with expectedVersion
api.commitState: Consumer-controlled idle, submitting, failed, conflict or accepted state; every non-idle state is bound to the exact commitId it describes.
api.commitOwnership: EditableGrid emits intent only; the consumer persists changes, publishes accepted rows and record versions, and returns commitState.
api.defaultBehavior: omitting editable columns leaves cells read-only; accepted rows remain consumer-owned

behavior.start: Pointer, Enter or F2 reaches the cell input without adding a second grid focus model.
behavior.draft: A parsed value differing from the accepted value creates one draft per stable cell identity; returning to the accepted value removes it.
behavior.baseline: The first draft in a row captures that row's opaque recordVersion; later edits in the same row retain the captured version until all row drafts are discarded or accepted.
behavior.validation: Parse or validation errors remain attached to the stable cell and prevent commit.
behavior.cancelCell: Escape discards only the active cell draft and returns focus to the gridcell.
behavior.discardAll: Discard removes every draft and validation error but never mutates accepted rows.
behavior.commit: One command emits one snapshot grouped by rowId with expectedVersion; submitting blocks duplicate commands and draft mutation.
behavior.failure: Matching failed or conflict state retains drafts, values, errors and focus context.
behavior.retry: After matching failed or conflict, another save snapshots the current drafts with a new commitId while retaining each row's originally captured expectedVersion.
behavior.accepted: Matching accepted state clears only unchanged cells from the submitted snapshot after every submitted row reflects every committed value and exposes a recordVersion different from its expectedVersion.
behavior.stale: A commit state whose commitId does not match the active request cannot clear or relabel drafts.
behavior.scopeReconciliation: When not submitting, a draft is removed if its rowId leaves rows or its columnId is no longer editable; submitting freezes the active snapshot until a matching outcome arrives.
behavior.query: Sorting and filtering use accepted row values during editing so a draft cannot move its own active cell.

accessibility.grid: EditableGrid reuses DataGrid ARIA Grid navigation and one roving gridcell tab stop.
accessibility.input: Each editable input has a row-and-column accessible name, aria-invalid and an associated error description.
accessibility.commands: Save and discard commands are keyboard reachable and expose disabled state during submitting.
accessibility.errors: Commit blocking focuses the first invalid input and preserves its associated error description; failure and conflict use non-destructive status or alert presentation.
accessibility.announcements: Draft count and latest commit outcome use polite live status without per-keystroke announcements.

oracles.stableCellDraft: Sorting or filtering never transfers a draft to another business row.
oracles.invalidCommitBlocked: Any parse or validation error produces zero commit requests and focuses the first invalid cell.
oracles.singleCommitWhileSubmitting: Repeated save activation during submitting emits no additional request.
oracles.failureRetainsDraft: Matching failure or conflict retains every submitted draft and accepted row.
oracles.staleResultIgnored: A non-matching commit result does not clear drafts or change the active request.
oracles.acceptedRequiresNewSnapshot: Drafts clear only when matching accepted state accompanies consumer rows with the committed values and new record versions.
oracles.rowVersionFreezesAtFirstDraft: Every changed cell in one row commits against the opaque version captured by that row's first surviving draft.
oracles.retryCreatesNewCommitIdentity: A retry after failure or conflict uses a new commitId and retains the captured expectedVersion.
oracles.scopeExitDropsOrphanDraft: Outside submitting, removing a row or its edit capability removes the corresponding orphan draft without mutating accepted rows.
oracles.escapeCancelsOneCell: Escape removes only the active cell draft and restores gridcell focus.
oracles.readOnlyColumnsStayReadOnly: Columns without edit configuration never render an input or enter editing.
